meaning: n.[动](南美的)羊驼,羊驼毛,羊驼呢(织物)
examples: Working with the sample above, what happens when you want to produce output using only the alpaca map?
Pianezzi, who said he has competed at the Dog Surfing World Championships, came up with the idea of surfing with an alpaca.
Llama and alpaca farmers have been badly hit by recurring water shortages.
On that flat and barren island, there are exported alpacas grazing and locals sell alpaca products and delicious smoked fish.
Blankets, wall hangings, handbags, table runners, alpaca-wool sweaters and scarves beam as brightly as the equatorial sun, lighting up the largest and finest craft market in South America.
